features: Double Duty - Twin USB-A ports pump out a combined 24W—enough to provide a full-speed charge to 2 phones at once. (Not compatible with Qualcomm Quick Charge.)
Ultra-Compact - The car charger’s super-small design conserves space, allowing seamless access to the rest of your dashboard.
Heavy Metal - Finished with a scratch-resistant aluminum alloy surface to match even the most pristine vehicle interiors.
Premium Components - Gold-plated circuitry reduces heat while charging to maximize charging speed and efficiency.
What You Get - PowerDrive 2 Alloy car charger, welcome guide, our worry-free 18-month warranty, and friendly customer service.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Model Number: A2727 Anker 320 Car Charger (24W II) The Compact, Aluminum Alloy 2-Port Car Charger Double Up Hit the road with twin USB-A charging ports equipped with Anker’s world-famous PowerIQ technology. Charge your phone and a passenger’s at full-speed—simultaneously. Super Small Designed to fit perfectly in your car’s DC outlet, without getting in the way of other ports, the radio knobs, or your coffee. Alloy Casing Built with a sleek and shiny aluminum alloy exterior that’s completely scratch-resistant. Ordinary car chargers experience reductions in charging speed during periods of extended use. Anker 320 Car Charger (24W II) eliminates this slowdown with interior gold-plated circuitry, specially designed to prevent overheating. Compatible With: iPhone 13 / 13 Mini / 13 Pro / 13 Pro Max / iPhone 12 / 12 mini / 12 Pro / 12 Pro Max / iPhone SE (2nd generation) /11 / 11 Pro / 11 Pro Max / XS / XS Max / XR / X / 8 Plus / 8; iPhone XS / XS Max / XR / X / 8 Plus / 8 / 7 Plus / 7 / 6S / 6 iPad 10.2-inch / iPad mini 8.3-inch / iPad mini 2 / 3 / 4, iPad Pro 10.5 inch Samsung Galaxy S10 / S10+ / S10e / S9 / S9+ / S8 / S8+ / Note 9 / Note 8 / Note 7 Huawei P10 / Mate 9 / Mate 20X / Mate 20 Pro LG G7 / V30+, Google Pixel / Pixel 3XL, Nexus 5X / 6P, Sony XZ2 Premium, Sony XZ3, and more (cables sold separately) Note: Anker 320 Car Charger (24W II) is designed to fit DC vehicle ports with minimal protrusion, although some may occur depending on the size of your car's DC port. It does not support Qualcomm Quick Charge. The charging page WILL NOT show fast charge when charging.
